# REQ-FR-260002: Curated archive content for the public site

- ID: FR-260002
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-21
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The public Crystord site shall review the `crystord_platform_archive` content and preserve only
the curated public-facing capabilities needed for the new site: landing-page product overview,
Google Add-on overview, Add-on Privacy page, Add-on Terms page, Add-on Support page, contact path,
and YouTube reference.

## Rationale

The archive contains useful public content, but not all visible features belong on the new static
landing site. The new site must preserve relevant public information while avoiding outdated auth
flows, optional marketing noise, and implementation coupling to the archive.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The archive is used as a reference source, not an implementation template.
- The new public site includes curated content for:
  - landing-page product overview,
  - dedicated Google Add-on page,
  - Add-on Privacy page,
  - Add-on Terms page,
  - Add-on Support page,
  - contact route or call-to-action,
  - YouTube reference.
- Newsletter promotion is excluded unless later re-approved.
- Landing-page sign-up and demo-login flows are excluded unless later re-approved.
- App-internal or authenticated archive routes are excluded from the public site.
- Legal and support copy are reviewed for accuracy before publication.
